Cost Reduction Idea: Replace PP-T30 used in the manufacture of the LH and RH DRL/Indicator Lamp Housings of MGI with PP-TD20
Estimated Cost Savings:
The evaluation is done before teardown, the values will change after the costing,
1. Per Kg rate PP-T30 - INR 220 (assumed)
2. Per Kg rate of PP-T20 - INR 200 (assumed)
3. The current weight of the housing - 350g
4. The estimated weight of the proposed housing - 340.6g
5. The estimated weight saved on LH & RH sides = 350 - 340.6 = 9.4*2 = 18.8g
6. The current cost of the housing - INR 77
7. The estimated cost of the proposed housing - INR 68.12
8. The estimated cost saved on LH & RH sides = 77 - 68.12 = 8.88*2 = INR 17.76
Proposal: Replace PP-T30 used in the manufacture of the LH and RH DRL/Indicator Lamp Housings of MGI with PP-TD20

Cost Reduction Idea: Redesign the mounting points allocated for the fasteners on the ambient light lenses reducing it's length to 15mm across all points and removing the locators

The evaluation is done before teardown, the values will change after the costing,
1. Per Kg rate of PC - INR 361.63

3. The estimated combined weight after redesigning = 31.6 + 10.4 + 9.1 = 51.1g
4. The estimated weight saved = 69.39 - 51.1 = 18.29g
5. The estimated cost saved = INR 6.61
Proposal: Redesign the mounting points allocated for the fasteners on the ambient light lenses reducing it's length to 15mm across all points and removing the locators
